title: hub-v3 PR2: plumbing write path to per-agent refs behind hub_v3 flag
description: Second PR of the hub v3 migration (.design/hub-v3-per-agent-refs.md, REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-8). Implement event writes via git plumbing (hash-object/mktree/commit-tree/update-ref) to refs/crosslink/agents/<agent-id> with fast-forward-only push semantics, gated behind a hub_v3 config flag. Single unified local lock per REQ-8. Dual-write soak in the crosslink repo itself. Acceptance: AC-1 (100-iteration two-agent concurrency, zero conflicts), AC-2 (crash-injection harness over the plumbing write path).
